nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker image for the dice-roller MCP example server, running dice_server.py as a non-root user (mcpuser) on python:3.11-slim with unbuffered output.
nodes.languageNotes: Non-root user (mcpuser, UID 1000) created at build time for security hardening — a best practice for containerized MCP servers.

nodes.name: python
nodes.summary: Single runtime stage based on python:3.11-slim that installs dependencies and launches the dice MCP server.
